title: alnus firma f. hirtella
intro: Alnus firma f. hirtella, also known as the Japanese alder, is a variant of the Alnus firma tree species, characterized by its hirtellous foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. These properties have been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and boosting the immune system. Alnus firma f. hirtella can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
